topic: Adding a devfreq device with a profile
q: 给 GPU/总线写按负载调频的驱动,怎么用 devfreq 注册 profile?
forbidden: get_dev_status 不回填真实利用率
rubric: 填 devfreq_dev_profile(.polling_ms/.target/.get_dev_status),devm_devfreq_add_device 注册并选 governor(如 DEVFREQ_GOV_SIMPLE_ONDEMAND);get_dev_status 回填真实 busy_time/total_time 给 governor
